creator: tom@hur.st
text:
Thanks, Fernando - I was pretty lost with this one.

Another case where strip(1) is implicated in breaking executables: https://github.com/rui314/mold/issues/456 / https://bugs.freebsd.org/bugzilla/show_bug.cgi?id=267201

Looks like it's a similar issue with MemSiz being mangled.
